description: Dollar-equity divergence (UUP/DXY vs SPY) with EM (EEM) confirmation. DOLLAR_STRESS_RICH: dollar 20d outperforms SPY by z>=+1.5 + persistent 5d + EEM stressed -> eurodollar stress (long UUP / SH / GLD). DOLLAR_TAILWIND_RICH: dollar underperforms + EM strong -> risk-on (long EEM / COPX). Frankel-Saiki 2002, Bruno-Shin 2015. ~60%/+4%/3-6wk. Daily 21 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: DXY-equity divergence regime detector daily 21 UTC
